prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to an application related to environmental permitting by the Environment Agency, which operates in England. It specifically addresses legislation and processes that do not apply to Scotland, where different regulations and agencies govern environmental permits.
